content: Symlinks in cruisinginthewake image trees (assets/ships/, images/ports/, assets/venues/, assets/articles/, authors/) are ALWAYS blocking, no exceptions. Operator's words: 'does it check for symlinks too? those are blocking.' A symlink pointing at another image is reuse with extra deniability; main's PR #1500/#1501 cleaned up 328 such symlinks (e.g., Adventure_of_the_Seas_02/03/04.webp all pointing at one Grand-Cayman shot; Caribbean_Princess_aerial.jpg pointing at the Belfast pier shot). Pre-commit hook uses lstatSync (not stat) and rejects on detection.
